Home › Orange County › Winter Park › Top-Rated & Safe

Top-Rated, Health-Safe Restaurants in Winter Park

Clean kitchen, happy room — and these 53 Winter Park restaurants pull off both at once. Every one clears an A health grade on top of strong diner ratings. LAS CARRETAS MEXICAN RESTAURANT tops the room at 4.9 stars.

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

  • A 100 L
    LAS CARRETAS MEXICAN RESTAURANT Mexican ★ 4.9 (22321) Winter Park · Orange County VeganVeg +2 more Inspected Feb 2026
